channel.title: Fan Work (new threads)
channel.description: Threads in the forum category "Fan Work" - A place where fan projects, art, and other stuff can be shown off or pimped, as needed.

item.title: Amazing SCP Artbooks!
item.content:encoded:
A few days ago someone sent me to this Instagram account by the name of para.books in which they have created an indiegogo page in order to raise funds to create some SCP Artbooks. They look really interesting and I want to help them out as much as possible, since I can't buy the books at the current time, So I figured I would also share it here! They also seem to be gaining a lot of traction in the SCP community so if you wanted to get them I would personally recommend getting them ASAP! I'm a little I won't be able to get any myself when I do come into some money after the holiday session is over haha.

Here is a link to their stuff:
Instagram:https://www.instagram.com/para.books/
Indiegogo page: https://www.indiegogo.com/projects/scp-foundation-artbooks#/

item.title: Converted a few scips to pdfs, and created a site to host 'em!
item.content:encoded:
I turned a few scips into pdfs a while ago, and I've done it again, with slightly cleaner formatting - currently I've done 15 scips, (including 093, which took a while aaaa).

I've also quickly whipped up a site for which to host the pdfs, which I'll update as I format more - https://sandro.is-a.dev/scipnet/

+ Some images (including a 3D render)
- Close
The 3D render:

A snippet of 093, in its twenty-seven page glory:

231 includes the hidden text:

The site itself:

I'm currently working off a list of the top few scips of each year (also serves to help me discover and read the classics), but, uh, lemme know if you've got any recommendations, I guess!

item.title: I draw SCPs in Comic Book style
item.description: You definitely want to check them out!
item.content:encoded:
Well, basically, I'm an Art Director which means drawing and designing stuff is my second nature.
I always had something to do on the side apart from my work and have been trying different things but none of them lasted long. Eventually, I realized that I want to create cartoons and created a YouTube channel. Turned out, I'm not a great writer and I suck at writing scripts so I decided to take SCP articles as scripts and go from there.

With all that said, here's some of my work that I want to share with you guys! Let's start with the first one I made - SCP-1048. Leave your thoughts/suggestions/opinions.

SCP-1048 - Builder Bear

item.title: SCP-1875 fan recreation
item.content:encoded:
The image
So I spent the last two days creating this thing. Hope you like it :)

item.title: "Official" SCP-999 Art
item.content:encoded:
My artwork of SCP-999

Many years ago, I wrote SCP-999. I've made a few other SCPs, but 999 is by far the most popular one I made, and quite possibly the most popular OC I've made. Even today I'm still floored by the sheer amount of fanart and videos this adorable little blob has spawned.

Yet despite all of this, I myself had yet to actually draw my own picture of SCP-999… until today! So consider this the first and thus far only piece of official SCP-999 art!

I actually started this last year as an excuse to try out some lineless painting, but only recently finished it.

item.title: Researchers app test
item.description: A test page of the software the Foundation uses for research.
item.content:encoded:
+ show block
– hide block

item.title: New music video for SCP-106/Scarlet King
item.content:encoded:
Hey all,

We're an Australian prog band that do a bunch of songs inspired by SCP stuff. We've just realeased another one inspired by 106/Scarlet King cult.

https://youtu.be/cHNadvPzJwQ

We've also done a bunch of others that are up on our Youtube page.

item.title: Proto-Sarkic "Folk" song demo
item.description: complete with adytite word salad, freshly tossed!
item.content:encoded:
Hello! I already have an art page up on the mainsite, but I'm posting this here since it's technically a song and I wasn't sure if you could put links to music on an art page.

As said in the title, this is a demo version of the song - I'm not quite satisfied with the overall quality yet. (It's due to me picking back up singing after 10+ years of hiatus, and had to make do with whatever inadequate equipment/instruments that were lying around at home.)

All of the components in the video were made by me, including the picture. I cross referenced a lot of the words in the lyrics with modern Finnish vocab, the Proto-Uralic database, and the Adytite Language article on the mainsite - I also took some Adytite words that were in OriCat's Klavigar Tales. I was aiming to create something that sounded like a distant dialect of Adytite which was later influenced by Finnish & Karelian. Still, I don't have a good grasp of linguistics, so the lyrics won't make sense gramatically if you listen too close to them.

Anyway, here's the song! I wish I could make it a series(or even better, a mainsite project, with some help of course…), as implied in the video title, but I'm not completely sure if I can b/c all the other stuff I have planned….

Excerpt from Festive Nälkän Chant #01
("Translation" is in subtitles.)

Thanks to everyone that checked this out!

item.title: SCP- CROSS CONTAINMENT
item.description: SCP Fighting Game I'm working on!
item.content:encoded:
Hey check it out! I've made an SCP fighting game and I plan to keep editing it for a long time coming! Check it out below!!

Please put video embeds in collapsibles
hide

And please disregard the opening for this trailer a little, I have a plan for the story mode but this isn't the main conceit for the game!!

item.title: I made an SCP YouTube channel.
item.description: I read stuff on there and that's about it.
item.content:encoded:
Yeah so now I read SCP stuff on YouTube so y'all can laugh at me. I have no idea how long it will last. I don't have much more to say, it's fan work so I though I should post it here.

Here's the channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCKw4tGfBnJjux1tub2JQAuA

Mega cool.

item.title: Klakkr's Artworks
item.content:encoded:
Hello !
I am a CGI artist and I recently created my own art gallery.
Feel free to propose any SCP to me.
Have a nice day.

item.title: SCP Songs I make
item.description: A collection of songs I have or will make regarding the SCP universe.
item.content:encoded:
My friends and I were planning on making an SCP game, but we've kind of lost track of it. But either way I've been wanting to make some SCP music so here's my first one. I used flat.io to make this. As much as I would love to be able to play this with my own instruments, Lord know I can't access an organ. Let me know what you guys think, and I might make more. I've been wanting to make music in general but I've been busy with school and stuff.

Anyways, here's the song: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j1TJh_VzHTE&feature=youtu.be]

More Songs:
[https://youtu.be/hKMRlFs82NI]
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z0eQexGbdlg]
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=10YwR05BnVI]
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hdPrVgjg2vM]

item.title: Pixels...
item.content:encoded:
Found an old work I did in the past.
Dunno why I made 049 into this…

●-Cairo 049
○-Vanish

item.title: Looking for artists for my SCP "It wants to Eat Me!!"
item.content:encoded:
I want an image for my first SCP, however, there is just one big glaring issue. With the appearance I put forth for the SCP, there is really no getting a good image for it without going to DND or such. As such I am looking for someone to volunteer to create an Image for my SCP. Unfortunately, this wouldn't be something you'd be paid for but I would certainly give you credit. Now, if you do decide on helping me you'll need to send me a private message to me on IRC since I still cannot reply or edit posts. My IRC is baporrare_. So yeah. Oh and if you want you can take a look at the SCP Im talking about its the first one
http://scp-sandbox-3.wikidot.com/baporrare

item.title: Question About Art pages
item.content:encoded:
I am planning to do an art page however I can't find much info
So I decided to ask here
Am I eligible to make one? If yes, How?
I also made a sandbox as a concept with my works
http://scp-sandbox-3.wikidot.com/ananomalouswriter

Have a nice day :)

item.title: The 001 Series: When Day Breaks
item.description: Starting an illustration series where I draw each of the 001 proposals. Starting with good ol' melty sun time
item.content:encoded:
As you saw on the summary, I'm starting to illustrate all of the SCP-001 proposals, starting with "When Day Breaks" on my instagram.

If you have an idea of which one I should do next, let me know!
-Keetz

item.title: Photos of SCP Foundation Playing Cards
item.content:encoded:
Created by independent artists KSS and TOOTH.

Photoshoots by Instagram@r_smith_creative

The decks are now available on CellArt, Etsy and eBay

deck photos
hide

-

-

-

-

This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 3.0 Unported License.

item.title: My interpretation of SCP-682 based off its new image
item.content:encoded:
After I noticed the image had changed for 682 my first impression was that I didn't like it however after I took a moment to think about it I realized how much of an amazing change it was from an artist point of view. I could not understand what it looked like and that meant for the most part I could do whatever I wanted with a few details in mind. If you want to see my new version of the new 682 click these links..

More mammal: https://sta.sh/016wvp83rbrz

More lizard: https://sta.sh/01qx2khhdni7

If you want to see more art by me check out my artist page: http://www.scpwiki.com/dr-whitney-s-art-pile ( which I really need to update)

Also if you would like to see art of a newer scp maybe even your own let me know in the comments I might not get to them since I have to work on my tale but who knows. :)

item.title: Can't read the skip stuff in SCP Blackout
item.content:encoded: anybody know if the Skips used in SCP Blackout have wiki entries? they don't have numbers in the game just letter combinations. >.> I can't read the containment documents in blackout the print is too small and I can still get attacked while reading. Do the things from the SCP games go on the wiki or do they have their own specific category? tried tweeting the dev but he's got a new baby and work its probably gonna take awhile for him to see it.

item.title: Tomb of Bennu (Failed SCP Idea)
item.content:encoded:
Hey everyone,
I created an SCP idea that didn't make it past the greenlight stage but I spent a lot of time writing it so would love to have someone read it, this wasn't a finalized draft so apologize for the rough spots. http://scp-sandbox-3.wikidot.com/jackexe thanks again for your time and I hope you enjoy.
